series_metadata.series_title: Fiscal Intermediary Records and Data Retention Schedule
series_metadata.series_description: The Fiscal Intermediary (FI) module will store and process data associated with adjudication and payment of Fee-for-Service (FFS) claims, routing of Managed Care claims submitted by Managed Care participating Providers to Managed Care Organizations (MCOs), processing and management of FFS Prior Authorization requests and responses, routing of Managed Care Prior Authorization requests and responses between Managed Care participating Providers and MCOs, receiving Managed Care Encounters from MCOs, and reconciliation activities. The FI vendor will also be responsible for storing and processing data resulting from ODM’s financial management operations.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Ten (10) years ; Electronic: Ten (10) years
